response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.20 below our 0.6 minimum threshold; sharing would compromise self-preservation in islanded conditions with sustained load—defer until your SoC recovers and aggregator can coordinate collective rebalancing.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.20 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: SoC declining despite acceptances; islanded condition with sustained 1 kW load. Prioritize self-preservation and aggregator coordination over peer requests until SoC recovers above 60%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
